image.title: NAC Yue, C Liu, J Wang, M Zhang, H Wu, C Li, X Yang

item.title: Association between social support and anxiety among pregnant women in the third trimester during the coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) epidemic in Qingdao, China: The mediating effect of risk perception.
